name: LEWAG Holding Aktiengesellschaft
summary: LEWAG Holding Aktiengesellschaft, through its subsidiary, HEGLA GmbH & Co. KG, engages in the manufacture and sale of machinery and systems, storage and logistics systems, and vehicle bodies. It serves its products to flat glass manufacturing and processing industries, as well as in related industries. The company operates primarily in Germany, France, Great Britain, Finland, China, India, the United States, and Russia. The company was founded in 1873 and is headquartered in Beverungen, Germany. LEWAG Holding Aktiengesellschaft is a subsidiary of HEVA Verwaltungs- und Anlagengesellschaft mbH & Co KG.
